title: chenxingqiang/YiRage
summary: YiRage是一个多后端LLM推理优化引擎，扩展了Mirage，支持CUDA、MPS、CPU、Triton、NKI、cuDNN和MKL后端，旨在提升模型推理性能和效率。
description: YiRage (Yield Revolutionary AGile Engine) - Multi-Backend LLM Inference Optimization. Extends Mirage with comprehensive support for CUDA, MPS, CPU, Triton, NKI, cuDNN, and MKL backends.
